name: conflict-atlas
description: An interactive vector world map for exploring geopolitical conflicts, genocides, occupations, and atrocities from 1490 to the present.
author: Yasser Bouhai
comment: The optionalDependency below works around npm bug npm/cli#4828 on Windows. It is skipped automatically on macOS/Linux (which pull their own rollup binary via rollup's own optionalDependencies).
